summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of Smile Savers Dental Clinic site. 14/14 backend pytest tests passed (services, doctors, testimonials, gallery, blog, bookings, contact, AI chat with Claude Sonnet 4.5). Frontend: home loads with NABH logo, all routes (/, /about, /services, /services/:slug, /doctors, /gallery, /blog, /contact, /booking) load successfully, 4-step booking stepper completes end-to-end and persists, AI Chat returns real Claude reply, mobile menu works, contact form submits, floating WhatsApp/AI/Call cluster visible.

issues: Mobile collapsed header at 390px shows only S·S logo and close icon — clinic name 'Smile Savers' is hidden via sm:block (intentional). NABH badge hidden on mobile (md:flex) — acceptable but worth confirming with user since NABH visibility was a brand requirement.

action_items: Optional: Consider showing NABH logo on mobile breakpoints since NABH is a key trust signal mentioned in PRD (currently hidden below md breakpoint).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: AI chat endpoint surfaces raw exception strings to client (HTTPException(500, f'AI error: {str(e)}')) — consider sanitising for production.
server.py: Bookings/contact have no authentication or rate-limiting — open POST endpoints. Acceptable for MVP but should be flagged for production hardening.
BookingStepper.jsx: phone validation regex /^\d{10,}$/ only checks length after stripping non-digits; OK but does not validate Indian mobile prefix (6-9). Minor.
AIChat.jsx: sessionId is module-level constant — same session id reused across page reloads of the SPA which is fine, but could be moved to useState/useRef so cross-tab sessions stay independent.
Header.jsx + Home.jsx: NABH logo URL hardcoded in two places — should be a shared constant to avoid drift.
Frontend has no global ErrorBoundary; an uncaught render error on any page will crash the app.
test_credentials: Not applicable - no auth flows in app
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed booking and contact rows during integration tests; safe to ignore.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 14 backend pytest tests in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py pass against the public preview URL. Booking stepper end-to-end (Service→Date/Time→Details→Confirm) verified — confirms via toast and shows BookingSuccess panel. AI Chat actually hits Claude Sonnet 4.5 via emergentintegrations and returns a real, contextually correct reply. Routes all render. The NABH logo is intentionally hidden on screens below md (768px) — confirm this is desired before marking the design done.
